column1: # Spinner lifecycle policy (B6 — R19 spinner render-thread ownership).
# The spinner render loop MUST park on its condvar (`wait_timeout_while`) between
# frames, so `term/spinner-stop` and interpreter teardown wake it immediately. A
# bare `thread::sleep` frame loop is the legacy shape (its sleeping thread could
# only stop after a full interval, and never on teardown). This allowlist has NO
